data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence regarding payment processing behavior.
data.assessment: The exploratory step titled 'Validate persona scenario #3' requires deterministic validation of the scenario involving an international card with currency conversion. However, there is no evidence provided that directly addresses the outcome of this scenario or confirms that the system behaves as expected under these conditions. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the booking and itinerary management but do not include any tests or validations related to payment processing failures or fallback mechanisms, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of payment processing behavior for international cards with currency conversion.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the payment processing behavior for international cards.
